data.title: demo: Durable Objects — hello world WebSocket room
data.description:
## Goal

Educational hello-world demo for Cloudflare Durable Objects with WebSocket hibernation.

## What to implement

* Durable Object `ChatRoom` that accepts WebSocket connections
* Broadcasts any received message to all connected clients
* Uses the hibernation API (`ctx.acceptWebSocket`)
* `wrangler.jsonc` with DO binding and migration

## Verify

```sh
# Connect two wscat sessions and send a message from one
wscat -c wss://<worker>.workers.dev/room/hello
```

## Repo

`skogai/cloudflare` — folder: `demos/do-websocket-hello`
